meaning: n.<美>飞机场行李搬运工人
examples: In an instant, a skycap was at his side.
In an instant, a skycap was at his side. "Sir," observed the porter, "you certainly have excellent communication skills."
Tipping is part of traveling, from the skycap who checks your luggage to the bellhop who takes your suitcase to your room.
James Williams, a skycap who checked in Simpson's luggage at the airport, said Simpson only checked the garment bag and golf bag, and that he saw Simpson with one duffel bag.
